calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/R. Edwards, CSR: Joann Prior
Barbara Kazuko Mizuno, Esq. for Plaintiff: Deborah Guillory present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Daniel Borden Johnson aka Daniel Borden Tupper aka Dan B. Johnson as follows:
Principal $85,788.88
Costs $337.50 for a total of $86,126.38
Judgment signed in open court.
